requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Direction
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向

summary.en: Solomon Islands has IEC and Australian-legacy technical influence, and any public, fleet, donor, utility, or resort charging project should be specified toward the IEC 62196 ecosystem: Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging. This is an IEC direction for a 50 Hz market, not a North American SAE J1772 direction. The required coupler, cable, locking, proximity-pilot, control-pilot, and DC communication implementation should be confirmed in each tender or site specification.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛受IEC及澳大利亚传统技术体系影响，任何公共、车队、援助资金、公用事业或度假设施充电项目均应按IEC 62196体系方向准备：交流Type 2、直流快充CCS2。这是50 Hz市场的IEC方向，而非北美SAE J1772方向。每个招标或场站规范均应确认所需耦合器、电缆、锁止、接近导引、控制导引和直流通信实现。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島受IEC及澳大利亞傳統技術體系影響，任何公共、車隊、援助資金、公用事業或度假設施充電項目均應按IEC 62196體系方向準備：交流Type 2、直流快充CCS2。這是50 Hz市場的IEC方向，而非北美SAE J1772方向。每個招標或場站規範均應確認所需耦合器、電纜、鎖止、接近導引、控制導引和直流通訊實現。

summary.en: China AC chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 and DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC and DC connectors are physically, electrically, and communicatively incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure. A GB/T charger cannot be made Solomon Islands-ready by labelling or paperwork alone.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩通常采用GB/T 20234.2，直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3并配套GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交直流接口在物理、电气和通信层面均与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基础设施不兼容。仅靠标签或文件无法使GB/T充电桩适用于所罗门群岛。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁通常採用GB/T 20234.2，直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3並配套GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交直流接口在物理、電氣和通訊層面均與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施不兼容。僅靠標籤或文件無法使GB/T充電樁適用於索羅門群島。

gap.en: GB/T chargers need a hardware change to IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2, including coupler geometry, cable assembly, locking, pilot signalling, DC communication, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, labels, and instructions. Confirm the required connector with Solomon Power, the importer, fleet, port, resort, aid-funded project, or charging-network operator before quoting.
gap.zh: GB/T充电桩需要硬件改为IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，包括耦合器几何结构、电缆组件、锁止、导引信号、直流通信、温升证据、备件、标签和说明书。报价前应与Solomon Power、进口商、车队、港口、度假设施、援助资金项目或充电网络运营商确认所需接口。
gap.zht: GB/T充電樁需要硬體改為IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2，包括耦合器幾何結構、電纜組件、鎖止、導引信號、直流通訊、溫升證據、備件、標籤和說明書。報價前應與Solomon Power、進口商、車隊、港口、度假設施、援助資金項目或充電網絡運營商確認所需接口。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by the buyer, utility, fleet, site owner, donor project, or network operator
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat connector conversion as a physical product redesign. GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 evidence does not make a charger interoperable with Solomon Islands projects that specify IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将接口转换视为实体产品重新设计。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930证据不能使充电桩自动兼容指定IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2的所罗门群岛项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將接口轉換視為實體產品重新設計。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930證據不能使充電樁自動兼容指定IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2的索羅門群島項目。
